summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DermaScan AI app. Found and fixed critical backend bug that was causing analysis timeouts. All core functionality now working correctly including image upload, AI analysis, results display, and PDF download.

critical_bugs.issue: UnboundLocalError in analyze_skin_image function - json module import was inside try block causing variable scope issues
critical_bugs.impact: Analysis requests were failing with 500 errors

passed_tests: Backend analyze endpoint with valid data
Backend analyze endpoint with invalid data
